# fleet module constants
AUDIT_CACHED = 'CACHED'
AUDIT_ERROR = 'ERROR'
AUDIT_OK = 'OK'
AUDIT_TIMEOUT = 'TIMEOUT'
STATUS_ENABLED = 'ENABLED'
STATUS_NOT_ENABLED = 'NOT_ENABLED'
STATUS_STALE = 'STALE'

# fleet public function / class signatures
AuditResult(status: 'str', env_score: 'float | None' = None, phase: 'str | None' = None, growth_level: 'int | None' = None, latest_audit: 'datetime | None' = None, message: 'str' = '', issues_summary: 'IssuesSummary | None' = None) -> None
Fact(file_path: 'Path', name: 'str', description: 'str', body: 'str', parse_ok: 'bool', malformed_frontmatter: 'bool' = False, links: 'list[str]' = <factory>, is_stale: 'bool' = False, is_superseded: 'bool' = False) -> None
FleetRow(pj_name: 'str', status: 'str', env_score: 'float | None' = None, growth_level: 'int | None' = None, phase: 'str | None' = None, latest_audit: 'datetime | None' = None, audit_status: 'str' = 'OK', message: 'str' = '', issues_summary: 'IssuesSummary | None' = None, subagents_30d: 'int' = 0, tokens_30d: 'int | None' = None, cache_hit_pct: 'float | None' = None, cache_reuse_factor: 'float | None' = None) -> None
IssuesSummary(line_violations: 'int' = 0, hardcoded_values: 'int' = 0, potential_duplicates: 'int' = 0, corrections_unprocessed: 'int' = 0, skill_quality_degraded_count: 'int' = 0) -> None
MemoryDir(memory_dir: Path, pj_display: str)
RecallHit(pj_display: 'str', file_path: 'Path', score: 'float', snippet: 'str', is_index: 'bool', is_linked: 'bool' = False, linked: "list['RecallHit']" = <factory>) -> None
aggregate_sessions_by_project(*, window_days: 'int' = 30, now: 'datetime | None' = None, canonical: 'Path | None' = None) -> 'dict[str, int]'
aggregate_subagents_by_project(subagents_path: 'Path | None' = None, *, window_days: 'int' = 30, now: 'datetime | None' = None) -> 'dict[str, int]'
build_queue_result(*, pj_slugs: 'List[str]', threshold: 'int', weak_signals_path: 'Optional[Path]', corrections_path: 'Path', last_evolve_map: 'Dict[str, str]', activity_map: 'Dict[str, Dict[str, int]]', generated_at: 'str', pj_paths: 'Optional[Dict[str, str]]' = None, material_slugs: 'Optional[List[str]]' = None, untracked_dir_map: 'Optional[Dict[str, str]]' = None) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'
classify_project(pj_path: 'Path', settings_path: 'Path | None' = None, auto_memory_root: 'Path | None' = None, stale_days: 'int' = 30, now: 'datetime | None' = None) -> 'str'
collect_fleet_status(root: 'Path | None' = None, settings_path: 'Path | None' = None, auto_memory_root: 'Path | None' = None, data_dir: 'Path | None' = None, timeout: 'float' = 30.0, max_workers: 'int' = 2, projects: 'list[Path] | None' = None) -> 'list[FleetRow]'
collect_untracked_materials(*, material_slugs: 'List[str]', tracked_slugs: 'set', threshold: 'int', weak_signals_path: 'Optional[Path]', corrections_path: 'Path', dir_map: 'Dict[str, str]') -> 'List[Dict[str, Any]]'
detect_equal_issue_counts(rows: 'list[FleetRow]') -> 'list[dict]'
enumerate_memory_dirs(projects_root: 'Path | None' = None) -> 'list[MemoryDir]'
enumerate_projects(root: 'Path') -> 'list[Path]'
format_hits(hits: 'list[RecallHit]', *, as_json: 'bool') -> 'str'
format_status_json(rows: 'list[FleetRow]') -> 'str'
format_status_table(rows: 'list[FleetRow]', now: 'datetime | None' = None) -> 'str'
main(argv: 'list[str] | None' = None) -> 'int'
new_corrections_by_pj(pj_slug: 'str', *, last_evolve_at: 'Optional[str]' = None, corrections_path: 'Path') -> 'int'
parse_fact_file(path: 'Path') -> 'Fact'
persist_last_evolve(pj_slug: 'str', *, ts: 'Optional[str]' = None, dry_run: 'bool' = False) -> 'Dict[str, Any]'
read_last_evolve(*, data_dir: 'Optional[Path]' = None) -> 'Dict[str, str]'
recall(query: 'str', *, limit: 'int' = 10, projects_root: 'Path | None' = None) -> 'list[RecallHit]'
resolve_auto_memory_dir(pj_path: 'Path') -> 'Path'
run_audit_subprocess(pj_path: 'Path', timeout: 'float' = 10.0, data_dir: 'Path | None' = None, rl_audit_bin: 'Path | None' = None) -> 'AuditResult'
select_evolve_queue(pj_materials: 'List[Dict[str, Any]]', threshold: 'int') -> 'List[Dict[str, Any]]'
weak_unprocessed_by_pj(pj_slug: 'str', *, weak_signals_path: 'Optional[Path]' = None) -> 'int'
write_fleet_run(rows: 'list[FleetRow]', fleet_runs_dir: 'Path | None' = None, now: 'datetime | None' = None) -> 'Path'
